# Function reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Compression

Compress LFP recordings to HDF5.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [compress_bin_to_h5](compress_bin_to_h5.qmd#lfpack.compress_bin_to_h5) | Full pipeline: raw LFP binary → decimate → Cadzow denoise → SVD+WP compress → HDF5. |
| [compress_to_h5](compress_to_h5.qmd#lfpack.compress_to_h5) | Compress a Cadzow-denoised .npy into a single HDF5 archive of LFPCompressed chunks. |
| [compress_pipeline](compress_pipeline.qmd#lfpack.compress_pipeline) | Full LFP compression pipeline: Cadzow denoise → SVD-adapt → WP threshold. |
| [compress](compress.qmd#lfpack.compress) | Compress an LFP snippet using adaptive SVD and wavelet-packet thresholding. |
| [decompress](decompress.qmd#lfpack.decompress) | Reconstruct LFP data from a compressed representation. |
| [run_cadzow_checkpoint](run_cadzow_checkpoint.qmd#lfpack.run_cadzow_checkpoint) | Cadzow-denoise a decimated LFP array in overlapping chunks and save a contiguous checkpoint. |

## Data types

Core data structures.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [LFPCompressed](LFPCompressed.qmd#lfpack.LFPCompressed) | Compressed representation of an (nc, ns) LFP matrix. |

## Reader

Random-access decompression.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [LFPackReader](LFPackReader.qmd#lfpack.LFPackReader) | Drop-in spikeglx.Reader for HDF5-packed LFP-compressed files. |

## Multi-recording archives

Combine or subset recordings across HDF5 files without re-compression.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [merge_h5](merge_h5.qmd#lfpack.merge_h5) | Merge multiple per-recording HDF5 files into one multi-recording archive. |
| [subset_h5](subset_h5.qmd#lfpack.subset_h5) | Copy a subset of recordings out of a multi-recording HDF5 archive. |
